overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian waterfront district during a hazy golden hour. The scene transitions from an open coastal path with industrial structures to a neon-lit commercial street and back to the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront promenade with large culvert pipes

events.description: camera begins moving forward from initial position, panning right to follow the waterfront path
large vertical billboard structure enters view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, passing industrial drainage pipes and derelict structures

notable_agents.action: character with pink hair sitting on concrete ledge

entered.detail: large industrial structure with neon signage and multiple levels
massive corrugated drainage pipes running parallel to the water
vertical neon sign attached to the industrial building
bright orange sun low on the horizon creating heavy atmospheric haze
calm water reflecting the orange sunlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy industrial waterfront during golden hour. The camera moves along a dirt path beside large culvert pipes, with an industrial building on the left and the ocean visible through the orange haze on the right. A character sits on a ledge to the left as the camera passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase transition connecting waterfront to elevated street

events.description: ego begins ascending concrete stairs to reach the upper street level
reaches top of stairs and enters the neon-lit commercial district

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs while approaching pedestrians and security personnel on the upper level

notable_agents.action: security officer in tactical gear standing guard near the stairs
pedestrian in dark clothing descending the stairs

entered.detail: tall advertising billboard with illuminated displays on multiple sides
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to street level
green painted metal safety railings along the stairs
cyan neon directional arrow sign pointing left

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase leading up from the waterfront. A large vertical billboard dominates the view, while security personnel and pedestrians appear near the top of the stairs. The industrial building recedes into the distance as the camera climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: yellow delivery truck and passenger vehicles drive past on the street
ego turns right to follow the curved sidewalk along the commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating the crowded sidewalk, passing street vendors and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery truck driving slowly down the commercial street
street vendor standing beside a food stall with umbrella

entered.detail: large cylindrical digital display showing advertisements
dense urban structures covered in neon signs and holographic displays
small food stall with striped umbrella and seating
large purple neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dense commercial corridor lined with towering neon signs and holographic billboards. Vehicles pass on the street while pedestrians crowd the sidewalk. A large curved digital billboard dominates the left side, and various vendor stalls line the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with vending machines and food stalls

events.description: passing brightly lit vending machines and food stalls under an overhead walkway
emerging from under the covered area back toward the open waterfront with bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and food vendors, heading back toward the waterfront railing

notable_agents.action: person wearing a hat and vest walking ahead
person sitting on a bench near the railing

entered.detail: bright red and green vending machines for food and drinks including 'BURRITO XXL'
wooden food stalls with canvas roofs and string lights
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street
decorative hanging lights strung across the walkway
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a market area featuring vending machines and food stalls under an overhead walkway. String lights hang above as the camera approaches the waterfront railing. The industrial building reappears on the left as the scene opens back up to the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront walkway with abandoned vehicles

events.description: returning to open waterfront with clear view of the ocean and setting sun
passing abandoned vehicle with open trunk and trash dumpsters near the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing, passing pedestrians and examining abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the wall using a phone
group of pedestrians walking toward the camera along the railing

entered.detail: derelict car with open trunk parked near the railing
large green dumpsters with open lids
bright orange sun reappearing as the camera exits the built-up area

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the open waterfront promenade, with the industrial building wall on the left and the ocean railing on the right. The bright hazy sun dominates the horizon again. The camera passes abandoned vehicles and dumpsters while pedestrians walk along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that travels from a hazy industrial waterfront into a dense neon commercial district before returning to the open coastline. It begins along a dirt path beside large culvert pipes and an industrial building, moving past a character on a ledge as the orange haze of golden hour obscures the ocean. The camera then ascends a wide concrete staircase toward a towering vertical billboard and security personnel, leaving the industrial zone behind to enter a crowded commercial corridor filled with holographic signs, passing vehicles, and vendor stalls. As the camera pushes through a market area under an overhead walkway with hanging string lights, the environment gradually opens back up toward the waterfront railing. Finally, the scene returns to the open promenade, passing abandoned vehicles and dumpsters while the bright, hazy sun dominates the horizon once more.
